telemetry.swarm_density_tooltip: Current agent count vs. maximum capacity. High density can impact latency and resource overhead.
telemetry.logic_depth_tooltip: The maximum recursive depth of agent chains. Deeper chains allow for complex problem solving but increase execution time.

telemetry.fiscal_burn_tooltip: Estimated operational cost per hour based on current token usage and recruiter demand.
